name: Beamable
description: Beamable — Game backend cloud service with modules for economy, inventory, leaderboards, and live-ops events.

seo.title: Beamable — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Beamable: Beamable — Game backend cloud service with modules for economy, inventory, leaderboards, and live-ops events.

when_to_use: Adding economy and inventory modules to Unity game projects
Live-ops events and seasonal content for mobile games
Virtual currency management for in-game purchase systems
Leaderboard and matchmaking backend as a managed service
Reducing game launch time with plug-in BaaS modules

pros: Faster than building backend from scratch
review.verdict: A strong shortcut for Unity live-ops teams, less compelling if you use Unreal or custom engines.
review.best_for: Unity studios adding economy, inventory, and live-ops quickly
review.not_for: Unreal Engine or custom-engine studios needing backend parity
